name: mnemo
description: Agentic knowledge management system for Codex and compatible agent workflows. Ingest raw files into a synthesized wiki, query the knowledge base, and save AI-generated insights permanently.

interface.longDescription: Ingest source files into a synthesized, searchable wiki; query your knowledge base; and preserve AI-generated insights as durable notes.
defaultPrompt: Use mnemo to initialize a knowledge base for this project.
Use mnemo to ingest notes from raw files into the wiki.
Use mnemo to query my knowledge base before answering.
